docs.title: Editions
docs.text:
Default 2025. Also 2007 and 2022. Notes language: Italian (EN via future ateco[en]).

See repository README for API and provenance.

docs.title: Contributing
docs.text:
1. Fork / branch from main
  2. Install: pip install -e ".[testing,linting,docs]"
  3. Run tests: python -m pytest or tox
  4. Run hooks: pre-commit run --all-files
  5. Add a towncrier news fragment under news/ for user-visible changes
  6. Open a pull request

Template changes that affect all pure-Python children must land in ateco first (AR-036).
